title: zigadenus angustifolius
intro: Zigadenus angustifolius, also known as Death Camas, is a perennial plant that belongs to the lily family. Historically, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties. The plant's roots and flowers contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting infections. Traditionally, Death Camas has been prepared as a tea or tincture, though its use is not recommended without proper guidance and caution due to its toxic properties and potential side effects.
